name: Coconut-Molasses Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, stir together the flour, baking powder, salt, ginger, and coconut.
2. Mix the liquid ingredients in a separate bowl (egg or egg replacer, buttermilk, molasses, and vanilla).
3. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the dry mixture until just moistened.
4. Fill well-greased muffin tins about 2/3 full with the batter.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes.
(Yield: 24 small or 12 large muffins)
